programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: An unimaginable abundance of life in the pitch-black darkness of the seabed; Antarctica is the coldest, harshest and most remote continent on earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Life exists in nearly every part of the oceans, and the different regions present unique challenges for its inhabitants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: The Big Blue is a marine desert, far from shore, miles deep, with almost nothing to eat and home to some of the largest creatures on Earth; special pressure-proofed cameras capture Sperm whales on the hunt for squid 3,000 feet down.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Pioneers strive to protect the ocean from the effects of human activity.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: At the coast, two worlds collide. Coasts is the story of how our wildlife survives in this ever-changing world. It's a roller-coaster ride of heart-stopping action and epic drama, with characters from beautiful to bizarre.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: In green seas, competition is fierce. Sunlight powers vast kelp forests, mangroves, prairies of seagrass and blooms of algae. Here, animals must fight for space and food. In kelp forests, a common octopus must become the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: The Princess Bride
programme.desc: A storybook stable boy turns pirate and rescues his beloved, who is about to marry a dreadful prince.

programme.title: A Knight's Tale
programme.desc: An English commoner (Heath Ledger) dons the armor of a dead jouster and, with the help of friends (Mark Addy, Paul Bettany, Alan Tudyk), competes against nobles in 14th-century France.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The parents of a missing child accuse each other of having the baby until a gruesome discovery is made.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green believe a possible love triangle was the motive behind the attempted assassination of a best-selling author.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives continue searching for a shooter who may be responsible for several unsolved murders years earlier.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy has trouble holding a case against a teenager's boyfriend suspected of killing two girls when she refuses to talk about his abuse.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a stockbroker points to organized crime when the prime suspect is killed by a hired hit man.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy and Carmichael find two patrolmen partially responsible for the killing of a white teenager in Harlem.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a bomb kills six on a helicopter flight, evidence points to a victim's wife who is influenced by two financial advisers (Annette O'Toole, Michael McKean).

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green first suspect gang members when a woman is found stuffed inside a car trunk, until they find out that she was married and having an affair.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green learn that a murdered woman was not only a patron of the arts, but that an artist she supported created a painting similar to the crime scene.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives' investigation into the strangulation of an Asian-American stripper leads them to corrupt officers.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives struggle to determine the motive of a club owner who hired two men to kill a stripper.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives suspect a comatose woman's husband tried either to commit a mercy killing or to kill her for her money.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: McCoy seeks to prosecute a high-level foreign dignitary for the torture and murder of a New York student 27 years earlier.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: David Attenborough tells the story of one of the most intriguing wild places on Earth, Madagascar; in splendid isolation, Madagascar has evolved its very own quite extraordinary wildlife, more than 80 percent of it is found nowhere else.

programme.title: Africa's Wild Year
programme.desc: Examining the extremes of summer in Africa; from droughts and famine to abundance and feasting, summer impacts the flora and fauna of the continent.

programme.title: Africa's Wild Year
programme.desc: Autumn in Africa brings opportunities; cape fur seals, Samango monkeys, chameleons, impala, and more respond to the season; autumn triggers changes in the lives of many animals; rare creatures reveal themselves and predators gather to take advantage.

programme.title: Africa's Wild Year
programme.desc: Winter in Southern Africa brings drought, ice and storms; the animals that live here must compete with the weather, the land and each other; cheetahs, seals, vultures, and meerkats; rains finally end the dry season and trigger a burst of life.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Kingdom
programme.desc: Four rival families leopards, hyena, wild dogs and lions all trying to claim a rich corner of Zambian paradise as their home; who will succeed in ruling this precious kingdom?

programme.title: Planet Earth: Kingdom
programme.desc: Leopard Mutima's relationship with her mother is at breaking point, and as the balance of power in Nsefu tips towards the lions, the hyena and wild dogs fight to raise their young.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Kingdom
programme.desc: Leopard Olimba finds a mate, but fortunes turn against the lions. Extreme flooding leads to disaster for the hyena clan, and the time has come for leopard Mutima to leave.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Kingdom
programme.desc: Injured wild dog Flint helps care for Storm's largest ever litter of pups. Leopard Mutima searches far and wide for a home, and the lions are challenged by forces beyond their control.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Kingdom
programme.desc: The final chapter... Olimba struggles with old age and the wild dog story takes an unexpected turn. Both lions and hyenas enjoy a baby boom - but who has the power to rule?

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: During World War II, a battle-hardened Army sergeant leads the crew of a Sherman tank on a deadly mission behind enemy lines to strike at the heart of Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: While visiting Spartan King Menelaus, Trojan prince Paris falls for Menelaus' wife, Helen and takes her back to Troy. Menelaus' brother, King Agamemnon uses his brother's fury as a pretext to declare war against Troy.

programme.title: Fury
programme.desc: During World War II, a battle-hardened Army sergeant leads the crew of a Sherman tank on a deadly mission behind enemy lines to strike at the heart of Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: The work of a dedicated female CIA operative becomes instrumental in the hunt for and elimination of Osama bin Laden.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: The eastern portion of the island is home to ring-tailed lemurs, jeweled geckos and predatory wasps.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: FOX and Friends
programme.desc: Co-hosts Steve Doocy, Ainsley Earhardt, Brian Kilmeade and Lawrence Jones highlight the latest.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: America's Newsroom
programme.desc: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

programme.title: The Faulkner Focus
programme.desc: Emmy-winning journalist Harris Faulkner provides the latest news with insightful analysis and interviews with top newsmakers.

programme.title: Outnumbered
programme.desc: Four female panelists and one male colleague share their perspectives on the day's top news stories.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: America Reports
programme.desc: A look at the latest news and headlines with Sandra Smith and John Roberts.

programme.title: The Story With Martha MacCallum
programme.desc: Martha MacCallum brings the story of the times with her tough but fair interviews and straightforward analysis;

programme.title: The Will Cain Show
programme.desc: Featuring Cain's signature podcast style and thoughtful perspective through conversations with newsmakers across politics, culture and sports.

programme.title: The Five
programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.title: Special Report With Bret Baier
programme.desc: Former Fox News chief White House correspondent Bret Baier takes a closer look at political stories from Washington, DC.

programme.title: The Ingraham Angle
programme.desc: Laura Ingraham aims to cut through the Washington chatter to speak directly with unexpected voices and the actual people who are impacted by the news of the day.

programme.title: Jesse Watters Primetime
programme.desc: Jesse Watters speaks with newsmakers from across the U.S. to present news with a clear and direct approach.

programme.title: Hannity
programme.desc: Sean Hannity interviews political figures and newsmakers and offers his own conservative perspective on events.

programme.title: Gutfeld!
programme.desc: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

programme.title: Fox News at Night
programme.desc: Hard news and analysis of compelling stories from DC and across the country; journalists provide viewers with must-see information and consequential news.

programme.desc: Dana Perino, Greg Gutfeld and Jesse Watters and rotating liberal co-hosts Jessica Tarlov and Harold Ford Jr. discuss and debate the hot issues across the spectrum from politics to pop culture.

programme.desc: FOX & Friends Weekend, hosted by Rachel Campos-Duffy and Charlie Hurt, highlights the latest in news, entertainment, politics, and sports.

programme.title: The Trump Wars
programme.desc: Donald Trump faces a field of 17 political heavyweights and becomes the unlikely winner of the 2016 GOP nomination for President.

programme.title: Rob Carson's What in the World?
programme.desc: Rob Carson dissects politics, cultural phenomena and the absurdity confronting America with humor and satire.

programme.title: First Edition
programme.desc: The host presents a round-up of the latest social, political and economic news updates and developments from across the country.

programme.title: News Now
programme.desc: Host Shannon Cake brings you live reporting, global field updates and insight-rich interviews shaping the day's high-stakes stories.

programme.title: National Update
programme.desc: Live national headlines, expert interviews and insight into the stories shaping America.

programme.desc: John Bachman tackles big news from DC, NY and around America.

programme.title: National Desk
programme.desc: Bringing breaking news, investigative reports, and political coverage.

programme.title: Newswire
programme.desc: Up-to-the-minute news updates, in-depth analysis, exclusive interviews and a fresh perspective on the day's top stories and key developments in breaking news, politics and current events.

programme.title: Ike Wingate America
programme.desc: Ike Wingate is a straight shooter who takes the complex stories of the day and lays them out logically and sensibly, making sense of the news.

programme.title: The Todd Starnes Show
programme.desc: Todd Starnes delivers breaking news and commentary covering politics, faith, and culture.

programme.title: Ed Henry: The Briefing
programme.desc: A comprehensive update, offering a dynamic blend of breaking news, political developments and business insights.

programme.title: Upheaval: The Journey of Menachem Begin
programme.desc: Imagery, rarely seen archival materials and interviews provide insight into the life and history of former Israeli Prime Minister Menachem Begin.

programme.title: The Dean Martin Celebrity Roast: Angie Dickinson
programme.desc: Dean Martin hosts a star-studded celebrity roast of Angie Dickenson.

programme.title: Battlefield Mysteries
programme.desc: The evidence is examined to determine who killed the so-called Black Baron in battle on Aug. 8, 1944.

programme.title: Battlefield Mysteries
programme.desc: A return to the battlefields above Europe to reveal the legend of the Intruders.

programme.title: Bible Land With Sergio and Rhoda
programme.desc: Chorazin, the ancient cursed city, is being reexcavated by archaeologist Achia Kohn-Tavor to find out if the synagogue truly dates to the first century.

programme.title: Bible Land With Sergio and Rhoda
programme.desc: Sergio goes on a journey with Yosi to the dangerous river of the Kishon, where Deborah and Barak defeated the 900 chariots of Sisera.

programme.title: The Land of Israel With Jon Voight: God's Story
programme.desc: Jon Voight visits Tel Azekah, the hill above the Elah Valley where the Battle of David and Goliath took place.

programme.title: The Land of Israel With Jon Voight: God's Story
programme.desc: Hiram, king of Tyre, builds David a palace; Philistines come to attack, and David defeats them; Jon Voight visits the remains of his palace.

programme.title: The Freedom File: Judge Napolitano
programme.desc: Judge Napolitano provides commentary on current events, drawing on his expertise in constitutional law to protect individual freedoms.

programme.desc: John Bachman focuses on the biggest news from D.C., N.Y., and around America.

programme.title: Newsfront
programme.desc: Russia and China combined may have twice as many nuclear weapons as the United States within a decade. The United States must modernize its aging nuclear arsenal.

programme.title: Tactical Wealth: From Military to Money
programme.desc: Hosted by former Navy SEAL Kaj Larsen, Tactical Wealth explores life after service, business, and building wealth.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: This gripping documentary reveals the delicate balance between maintaining peace and navigating chaos in the everyday lives of law enforcement officers.

programme.title: Caught on Bodycam
programme.desc: Raw bodycam footage capturing high-stake police incidents.

programme.title: Newsfront
programme.desc: A weaponized Department of Justice and rogue district attorneys target former President Donald Trump, his aides, and his supporters at the height of the 2024 election season.

programme.title: Coolidge: Rediscovering an American President
programme.desc: Exploring the life and legacy of America's 30th president, Calvin Coolidge, who oversaw a great period of prosperity and cut taxes while reducing federal debt.

programme.title: Ronald Reagan: An American Journey
programme.desc: An in-depth look at Ronald Reagan, including his early acting career, his near assassination, his revolutionary international relations, and his personal life.

programme.title: 1968: The Year Everything Fell Apart
programme.desc: The year 1968 started out with a renewed hope but quickly turned into a roller coaster year of ups and downs; it is now considered one of the most divisive, yet significant years in American history.

programme.title: Beyond Watergate: The Richard Nixon Story
programme.desc: A look at the enigmatic life of Richard Nixon, from his rise to power as the 37th U.S. president to the infamous Watergate scandal.

programme.title: JFK: The Ultimate Conspiracy
programme.desc: Investigating conspiracy theories about President John F. Kennedy's assassination in Dallas Nov. 22, 1963.

programme.desc: Presents news delivering key facts, expert insights, and in-depth analysis to kickstart your day.

programme.desc: Officers respond to seemingly ordinary situations - that take unexpected turns. In one incident a routine waste disposal violation escalates into a dramatic confrontation.

programme.desc: Morning news with the Real America's Voice team live from West Palm Beach, Florida.

programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, a Christian minister, discusses religious teachings and encourages people to live ethically.

programme.desc: Pathway to Victory provides practical application of God's Word to everyday life through clear, Biblical teaching.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What are you expecting from life? Today, Joyce shares practical ways to stay hopeful, thankful and focused on what's ahead.

programme.desc: Recognizing one's identity in Christ.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: The mission of John Hagee Ministries is to take the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Joel and Victoria Osteen's message of unconditional love and unending hope reaches everyone across the world.

programme.title: Allen Jackson Ministries
programme.desc: What's the best way to prepare for the uncertain future? Trust God with our resources! Pastor Allen Jackson talks about biblical principles surrounding the money, resources, and possessions.

programme.desc: Pastor Steven shares the key to sustaining strength in a draining world.

programme.title: Kingdom Connection With Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: A mission to share the profound truths of God's Word; with each episode, viewers are inspired by Franklin Jentezen's words, which echo the timeless wisdom of the scriptures.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: Pathway to Victory is the broadcast ministry of Dr. Robert Jeffress and the First Baptist Church of Dallas, Texas. The bold and practical Bible teaching of Pastor Jeffress pierces the darkness with the light of God's Word.

programme.title: Winning Walk
programme.desc: The international teaching ministry of the Rev. Dr. Ed Young, senior pastor of Second Baptist Church in Houston, proclaims the truth of God's word to people throughout the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: What are you expecting from life? Today, Joyce shares practical ways to stay hopeful, thankful and focused on what's ahead.

programme.title: Better Together
programme.desc: Better Together is an original faith-centered talk show produced by women and just for women.

programme.desc: Behind the Scenes gives viewers a daily update of the ministries & activities taking place each day at TBN locally and around the world.

programme.title: Charlie Kirk Today
programme.desc: Join Charlie Kirk as he breaks down the news, challenges the mainstream narrative and delivers commentary on faith, culture and politics; no spin, no censorship, just the truth.

programme.title: Allen Jackson NOW
programme.desc: A lifeline for a struggling and anxious nation; a guiding hand for those who are not ready to give up, and for those who want to find a way past the negativity before things get worse; searching for the wisdom embedded in a Christian World View.

programme.title: Stakelbeck Tonight
programme.desc: Host Erick Stakelbeck takes viewers around the world; from Jerusalem to London to Washington, D.C., pointing beyond with cutting-edge commentary, analysis and interviews focusing on ever-changing events and why they matter.

programme.title: Break Every Chain
programme.desc: Facing the threat of losing his job as a police officer, the loss of his wife and daughter, and contemplating suicide, a man turns to faith and finds hope and redemption.

programme.title: 1st Look
programme.desc: The 2025-26 New York Knicks end a 53-year championship drought, igniting a healing outpouring of joy across the five boroughs and the entire nation.

programme.title: Fast: Home Rescue
programme.desc: Tre and Cierra Boston rescue a house in Trumann, Arkansas after it was badly damaged by an EF2 Tornado; with only five days to pull it off, they transform the property into a homesteaders ranch themed home.

programme.title: Raw Travel
programme.desc: Travelers and locals around the world change how people think about farm living.

programme.title: News10NBC Saturday Today at 6AM
programme.desc: News10NBC Today provides live breaking news, First Alert Weather forecasts and exclusive investigative and enterprise reporting to the Rochester, NY region.

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom Protecting the Wild
programme.desc: Dr. Rae joins researchers using advanced tools in Mexico to study gray whales, wolverines and toads; meanwhile, Peter dives into the Great Barrier Reef where scientists are cultivating heat-resistant coral to help protect their fragile ecosystems.

programme.title: Earth Odyssey With Dylan Dreyer
programme.desc: Dylan Dreyer takes an avian adventure to discover penguins in the Antarctic, an Australian bird that dances to attract a mate and pink flamingos gathering by the thousands.

programme.title: 2026 Tour de France
programme.desc: Stage 20 of the Tour de France features 170.9 km of mountainous terrain from Le Bourg d'Oisans to Alpe d'Huez.

programme.title: Forever Young With Dr. Pablo Prichard
programme.desc: Danielle and Dr. Pablo dive into the science of sleep with the help of drummer Gina Schock; through lab testing and immersive storytelling, the trio breaks down the main forces that control sleep and what happens when they stop working in harmony.

programme.title: 2026 Senior Open Championship
programme.desc: The Moving Day of individual stroke play at the 2026 ISPS Handa Senior Open continues at King's Course in Perthshire. The Gleneagles course is renowned for its deep-cut bunkering and unpredictable crosswinds, testing the players' skills.

programme.title: Track and Field
programme.desc: From Icahn Stadium in New York.

programme.desc: Local and regional news coverage.

programme.title: NBC Nightly News With Tom Llamas
programme.desc: Tom Llamas anchors the latest news, going beyond the headlines to see how lives are affected by the world around them.

programme.title: Have Thinning Hair? Keranique Can Help Regrow Beautiful, Thicker Hair!
programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: A new group of ninjas enters the competition as the central regional qualifying rounds begin in Las Vegas with an updated obstacle course; hosts Matt Iseman and Akbar Gbajabiamila, along with co-host Zuri Hall, select their fastest pick of the night.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A mother searches for answers in the unsolved murder of her 14-year-old daughter until new DNA technology changes everything.

programme.title: 1st Look
programme.desc: Two luxury travel advisors compete for a chance to win the future business of Bachelor Nation couple Ashley Iaconetti-Haibon and Jared Haibon.

programme.title: Open House NYC
programme.desc: Power couples living in style include design duo Tarek and Heather Rae El Moussa in Newport Beach, Calif. And DJs Hannah Bronfman and Brendan Fallis in downtown New York.

programme.title: Access Hollywood
programme.desc: Hosts Mario Lopez, Kit Hoover, Scott Evans and Zuri Hall take viewers behind the velvet ropes and onto the red carpet to deliver celebrity interviews and entertainment news stories in Hollywood.

programme.title: Storm of Suspicion
programme.desc: This gripping true-crime series examines spellbinding events where weather played a central role in solving or covering up the crime, featuring experts and forensic meteorologists.

programme.title: Open House NYC
programme.desc: Host Sara Gore presents a guide to upscale real estate in and around the Big Apple; in addition to a look at the homes on the market, provides interior design tips from specialists and a wealth of information on renovation and stylish living.

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: On this hidden-camera prank show, everyday people get caught up in gags with hilarious consequences.

programme.title: Beautiful Homes & Great Estates
programme.desc: Malibu's Villa Esmeralda estate features coastal scenic views and meticulously curated architecture.

programme.title: Sunday Mass
